case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS BOE, LUKE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,101.80 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BOE, LUKE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
